title: Dutch Casserole Delight
description: A hearty Dutch casseroles recipe made with golden brown ingredients. It's perfect for a cozy meal.
instructions: Grease the casserole dish with butter.
Arrange a layer of potatoes in the dish.
Sprinkle with cheese and onions, then repeat.
Top with additional cheese and dot with butter.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
